{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Akura vault gate
| introduced = cradle-06-underlord
}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Akura vault gate]] is a thick stone entrance.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c18">''Underlord'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
